nodes.name: Main Cannon
nodes.description: Installed nose cannon. Each additional main cannon equipped boosts hull firepower and fires on the manual trigger.

nodes.name: Linked Turret
nodes.description: Brings your fixed forward turret online for continuous aimed fire. Until you unlock this, only your manual nose cannon fires in combat.

effects.specialDesc: Unlocks automatic main + side turret fire

nodes.name: Cooling Jacket
nodes.description: Thermal routing around the nose cannon barrel dumps waste heat faster so each shot heats the core less.

nodes.name: Rapid Vent Valves
nodes.description: High-flow purge vents cut the time your nose cannon stays offline after a thermal overload.

nodes.name: Kinetic Mass Drivers
nodes.description: Solid slug throwers boost impact damage. Paid in scrap only.

nodes.name: Fire Control
nodes.description: Servo-linked triggers and belts increase fire rate.

nodes.name: Plasma Cannons
nodes.description: Reinforced energy weapons deal more damage per shot.

nodes.name: Accelerator Coils
nodes.description: Electromagnetic coils increase projectile velocity.

nodes.name: Targeting Matrix
nodes.description: Precision optics increase critical hit chance.

nodes.name: Plasma Beam
nodes.description: Mounts a secondary plasma beam cannon that fires independently from your main weapon.

nodes.name: Multi-Barrel
nodes.description: Fire one additional projectile per shot.

nodes.name: Overclocked Cells
nodes.description: Critical hits deal significantly more damage.

nodes.name: Homing Missiles
nodes.description: Adds a homing missile launcher that fires independently from your main weapon.

nodes.name: Dark Plasma
nodes.description: Adds a dark plasma cannon that fires independently from your main weapon.

nodes.name: Continuous Beam Laser
nodes.description: Mounts a sustained-fire beam laser that locks onto the nearest enemy. Fires for 3 seconds, then recharges for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Hull Plating
nodes.description: Reinforced hull plating increases maximum hull integrity.

nodes.name: Composite Armor
nodes.description: Dense alloy layers reduce all incoming damage.

nodes.name: Shield Generator
nodes.description: Electromagnetic shields absorb incoming damage. The shield emitter draws power continuously.

nodes.name: Nanobots
nodes.description: Self-replicating nanobots slowly repair hull damage.

nodes.name: Shield Capacitors
nodes.description: Improved capacitors regenerate shields over time.

nodes.name: Salvage Winch
nodes.description: Mechanical tow lines pull in debris from farther away.

nodes.name: Thruster Upgrade
nodes.description: Enhanced thrusters increase ship agility.

nodes.name: Warp Throttle
nodes.description: Push your sublight engines into overdrive. You tear through space faster — but enemies close the gap quicker and sector traffic thickens.

nodes.name: Gravity Tether
nodes.description: Increases the range at which loot is auto-collected.

nodes.name: Salvage Protocols
nodes.description: Advanced salvage algorithms extract more resources.

nodes.name: Priority Designator
nodes.description: During a run, click an enemy to designate it as your primary target. While you have automatic turrets unlocked, auto-fire and the beam laser focus it until it is destroyed, then targeting returns to automatic. Clicking empty space still fires your nose cannon.

nodes.name: Stellar Collector
nodes.description: Cosmic array passively generates Stellar Dust.

nodes.name: Scrap Magnet
nodes.description: Enhanced salvage systems extract more Scrap Metal.

nodes.name: Plasma Refinery
nodes.description: Crystal resonators amplify Plasma Crystal yields.

nodes.name: Bio Harvester
nodes.description: Organic extractors collect more Bio Essence.

nodes.name: Wing Cannons
nodes.description: Reinforced wing struts mount heavy forward cannons, visibly widening the ship profile.

presentation.flavorText: More wing. More firepower. Simple math.

nodes.name: Anti-Scout Doctrine
nodes.description: Scouts move slower and your weapons punch through their thin hulls.

presentation.flavorText: Fast ships die fastest when you know where to aim.

nodes.name: Drone Companion
nodes.description: A loyal combat drone orbits your ship and assists in battle.

synergies.label: Drone Vampire
synergies.desc: Drone kills also trigger vampiric healing.

presentation.flavorText: It was lonely out here. Not anymore.

nodes.name: Vampiric Rounds
nodes.description: On-kill: restore hull integrity equal to 3% of the enemy's max HP. Bonus heal at low hull.

effects.specialDesc: On-kill: heal 3% of enemy max HP

nodes.name: Damage Reflection
nodes.description: Deflector plating reflects 20% of contact damage.

nodes.name: Stellar Nova
nodes.description: Periodically releases a burst of stellar energy.

nodes.name: Bio Harvester Mk II
nodes.description: Next-generation bio extractors massively increase Bio Essence yields. Synergy discount with Bio Boost.

nodes.name: Overcharge
nodes.description: Every 10th shot deals massive burst damage.

nodes.name: Crit Mastery
nodes.description: Advanced targeting theory pushes critical hit capability to its physical limit.

synergies.label: Precision Carnage
synergies.desc: Crits also trigger a small AoE blast.

presentation.flavorText: Precision is a state of mind.

nodes.name: Round Accelerator
nodes.description: Enemy spawns are faster and more plentiful, but loot pours in proportionally.

presentation.flavorText: More targets. More glory. More scrap.

nodes.name: Nova Core
nodes.description: A miniature stellar core that amplifies all combat and triggers powerful on-kill chain reactions.

presentation.flavorText: You carry a dying star. It is not at peace.

nodes.name: Plasma Core
nodes.description: A supercharged plasma cell amplifies your dark plasma cannon with visibly larger, brighter bolts.

presentation.flavorText: The bolts leave scorch-light even after impact.

nodes.name: Quantum Tunneling
nodes.description: Phase-shifted rounds punch through enemies instead of stopping on first contact.

nodes.name: Incendiary Warheads
nodes.description: Shots coat enemies in burning plasma that deals 4 DPS for 3 seconds.

nodes.name: Cryo Rounds
nodes.description: 40% chance on hit to slow targets to 60% speed for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Reactive Plating
nodes.description: Impact-reactive hull plating detonates a shockwave when struck. 1.5s cooldown.

nodes.name: Hull Nanites
nodes.description: Self-repairing nanobots accelerate hull restoration.

nodes.name: Cargo Expander
nodes.description: Modular cargo bays increase loot earned from every kill.

nodes.name: Debris Field
nodes.description: Killed enemies have a 40% chance to leave volatile wreckage that harms nearby foes.

nodes.name: Dark Matter Antenna
nodes.description: Exotic resonance collectors passively accumulate dark matter.

nodes.name: Interest Accrual
nodes.description: Before each run launches, earn 2% of your stored Scrap Metal as bonus income.

nodes.name: Resonance Field
nodes.description: +5% damage per 10 kills this run. Stacks up to +50%. Resets each run.

nodes.name: Momentum Engine
nodes.description: The faster you fly, the more Stellar Dust your collectors harvest.

nodes.name: Corrosive Aura
nodes.description: Enemies within your gravity tether range are continuously damaged by corrosive plasma.

nodes.name: Gravity Well
nodes.description: Your shields project a graviton field that slows all enemies within magnet range to 45% speed.

nodes.name: Berserker Protocol
nodes.description: Each kill grants a 5-second attack speed frenzy. Stacks with rapid kills.

nodes.name: Glass Cannon
nodes.description: Massively increases damage output, but your hull is paper-thin. You hit like a comet and shatter like one too.

nodes.name: Siege Engine
nodes.description: Converts your ship into a slow-moving artillery platform. Enormous firepower, but you can barely maneuver.

nodes.name: Frenzied Assault
nodes.description: Overclock your weapons to a blistering rate of fire. Loot magnetism collapses — you're too busy shooting to collect.

nodes.name: Juggernaut
nodes.description: Reinforce your hull to armored fortress levels. You become a slow, nigh-unkillable behemoth.

nodes.name: Predator Instinct
nodes.description: Enemies sense your aggression and press harder — but so do the rewards. More danger, more spoils.

nodes.name: Overclocked Capacitors
nodes.description: Divert all shield energy into the weapon array. Shields offline permanently — but weapons fire without mercy.

nodes.name: Blood Price
nodes.description: Your weapons feed on your own life force. Damage climbs while your HP slowly drains. Never outright lethal.

nodes.name: Reactor Core
nodes.description: A compact fission reactor powers your ship's high-energy systems, generating a steady stream of energy.

nodes.name: Running Hot
nodes.description: Push the reactor past safe limits for massive energy output — but the excess heat bleeds into your cannon.

nodes.name: Solar Cells
nodes.description: Arrays of photovoltaic panels harvest starlight for clean, scalable energy generation.

nodes.name: Bioreactor
nodes.description: Converts bio essence into high-energy plasma. Generates significant power at the cost of bio essence reserves.

nodes.name: Antimatter Engine
nodes.description: Annihilates dark matter for extraordinary energy. The most powerful generator in the galaxy.

nodes.name: Bio Lab
nodes.description: A pressurized cultivation chamber generates bio essence passively from stellar radiation.

nodes.name: Bioweapon Rounds
nodes.description: Weaponizes bio cultures: each projectile hit applies corrosive bio-toxin to the target.

nodes.name: Plasma Farm
nodes.description: Magnetic coils harvest trace plasma from engine exhaust, slowly crystallizing it into usable currency.

nodes.name: Particle Collider
nodes.description: A ring-shaped accelerator smashes particles together, producing trace amounts of dark matter as a byproduct.

nodes.name: Repulser Field
nodes.description: A periodic electromagnetic pulse violently pushes nearby enemies away from your ship.

nodes.name: Repulser Frequency
nodes.description: Tuned resonance circuits charge the repulser faster.

nodes.name: Repulser Range
nodes.description: Extends the effective radius of the repulser field.

nodes.name: Repulser Damage
nodes.description: Charges the repulser field with lethal energy — enemies caught in the pulse take direct damage.

nodes.name: Combat Scanner
nodes.description: Deep-scan sensors extend your vision range and reveal enemy weak points, increasing critical hit chance.

nodes.name: Structural Analysis
nodes.description: AI-assisted structural mapping actively highlights enemy vulnerabilities in real-time.

nodes.name: Phoenix Drive
nodes.description: An emergency resurrection system. When your hull is destroyed, the Phoenix Drive triggers a one-time revival. Has a long recharge.

nodes.name: Phoenix Overclock
nodes.description: Optimized recharge circuitry reduces the Phoenix Drive's cooldown.

nodes.name: Phoenix Nova
nodes.description: The revival explosion deals massive damage to all nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Salvaging Beam
nodes.description: A tractor beam tears scrap from destroyed enemies, converting it directly into hull repairs.

nodes.name: Dual Salvage Beams
nodes.description: An additional beam doubles your salvage rate.

nodes.name: Salvage Efficiency
nodes.description: Improved targeting algorithms extract more hull material per salvage cycle.

nodes.name: Mining Laser
nodes.description: A high-powered cutting laser extracts rare minerals from asteroids, boosting resource yields.

nodes.name: Mining Yield
nodes.description: Enhanced extraction heads increase ore yield per asteroid.

nodes.name: Twin Mining Arrays
nodes.description: A second mining laser doubles your extraction capacity.

nodes.name: Twin Auto Cannons
nodes.description: Mounts a second auto cannon turret, doubling your automated fire coverage.

nodes.name: Rapid Cycler
nodes.description: High-cycle feeds push the auto cannons past their rated fire limits.

nodes.name: Explosive Rounds
nodes.description: Shells detonate on impact, dealing splash damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Twin Missile Racks
nodes.description: A second rack of homing missiles provides continuous saturation fire.

nodes.name: HE Warheads
nodes.description: High-explosive warheads create devastating kill-zone explosions.

nodes.name: Focus Crystal
nodes.description: A resonance crystal focuses laser energy on a sustained target, ramping damage the longer it stays locked.

effects.specialDesc: Laser damage ramps on focused target

nodes.name: Beam Splitter
nodes.description: A prismatic lens splits your laser beam into multiple simultaneous targets.

nodes.name: Rail Gun
nodes.description: A magnetic accelerator that builds up charge before unleashing a devastating piercing shot. Draws significant energy.

effects.specialDesc: Charges and fires a high-damage piercing shot

nodes.name: Cannon Override
nodes.description: Replaces your manual nose cannon with the rail gun for maximum penetration power.

effects.specialDesc: Manual cannon replaced by rail gun

nodes.name: Fast Charger
nodes.description: Superconducting rails reduce the charge buildup time.

nodes.name: Multi-Target Array
nodes.description: Distributed targeting logic allows each weapon turret to independently track a different enemy.

nodes.name: Lock-On Accelerator
nodes.description: Neural prediction algorithms reduce target acquisition lag.

nodes.name: Speed Booster
nodes.description: An afterburner that temporarily doubles your thrust for rapid repositioning. Press [1] to activate.

nodes.name: Thrust Amplifier
nodes.description: Boosts the speed multiplier on the afterburner.

nodes.name: Afterburner Cooldown
nodes.description: Faster capacitor recharge cuts the cooldown on the speed booster.

nodes.name: EMP Burst
nodes.description: A massive electromagnetic pulse stuns all enemies for several seconds. Press [2] to activate.

nodes.name: EMP Capacitors
nodes.description: High-density capacitors recharge the EMP faster.

nodes.name: Extended Stun
nodes.description: Tuned frequency output extends the EMP stun duration.

nodes.name: EM Damage Field
nodes.description: The EMP burst deals direct damage to all enemies it stuns.

nodes.name: Warp Drive
nodes.description: Teleports your ship forward instantly, phasing through danger. Press [3] to activate.

nodes.name: Warp Efficiency
nodes.description: Optimized field coils reduce warp capacitor recharge time.

nodes.name: Gravity Bomb
nodes.description: Detonates a localized gravity singularity that pulls all nearby enemies inward. Press [4] to activate.

nodes.name: Gravity Well
nodes.description: Expands the gravity bomb's singularity radius.

nodes.name: Gravity Compression
nodes.description: Compressed singularity formation reduces cooldown.

nodes.name: Gravity Shear
nodes.description: Tidal forces at the singularity boundary deal direct damage to pulled enemies.

nodes.name: Combat Decoy
nodes.description: Projects a holographic duplicate of your ship that draws enemy fire. Press last available slot to activate.

nodes.name: Decoy Uptime
nodes.description: More robust holographic emitters extend decoy lifetime.

nodes.name: Decoy Array
nodes.description: Deploy multiple decoys simultaneously for wider distraction coverage.

nodes.name: Hologram Efficiency
nodes.description: More efficient emitter algorithms reduce the energy cost of deploying a decoy.

nodes.name: Plasma Amplifier
nodes.description: Capacitor arrays charge each plasma bolt to higher energy, increasing impact damage.

nodes.name: Plasma Vortex
nodes.description: Destabilized plasma bolts spiral on impact, releasing burst energy that harms nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Beam Intensity
nodes.description: Higher-density emitters concentrate the beam for greater damage per second.

nodes.name: Sustained Discharge
nodes.description: Reinforced emitter coils extend the beam's active window before it must recharge.

nodes.name: Hull Reinforcement
nodes.description: Additional structural bracing significantly increases maximum hull integrity.

nodes.name: Ablative Coating
nodes.description: An outer layer of ablative material disperses impact energy, reducing incoming damage.

nodes.name: Trigger Link
nodes.description: Routes the plasma beam to your manual trigger. Fires on click instead of automatically.

nodes.name: Trigger Link
nodes.description: Switches your missile rack to manual launch mode. Fires on click.

nodes.name: Trigger Link
nodes.description: Switches your plasma cannon to manual fire. Discharges on click.

nodes.name: Trigger Link
nodes.description: Switches the beam laser to manual activation. Hold to sustain; release to cut.

nodes.name: Shield Capacitors
nodes.description: High-density energy cells expand the maximum shield capacity.
